The '''Fire Breather''' was a huge leviathan with tough hide and natural chemicals that was manipulated by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] for use as a heavy support organism.

==Characteristics==
[[File:Ogniodmuchy.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Fire breathers]]

These deadly war beasts had flexible proboscises that spewed streams of gelatinous flame, pores that exhaled [[anti-laser aerosol]]s, and hides thick enough to withstand all but a blast from a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]].

The liquid flame was created through a unique chemical reaction caused by the mixture of [[Methane/Legends|methane]], [[Hydrogen sulfide/Legends|hydrogen sulfide]], and a mysterious substance deep within the guts of the Fire Breather. The beasts were often deployed for clearing out entrenched enemy positions.

A smaller [[Fire Spitter|anti-personnel]] version also existed.

==History==
Fire Breathers were first encountered on [[Gyndine/Legends|Gyndine]] where they burned the forests and caused the lakes to boil. According to most reports, the Fire Breathers acquired swamp gas from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mimban/Legends|Mimban]] in the [[Circarpous system/Legends|Circarpous system]], prior to invading Gyndine. Fire Breathers also appeared with an invasion on [[Artorias]].<ref name="Invasion1">[[Invasion 1|''Invasion'' 1]]</ref>

Later in the war, the Fire Breathers were fought off by a platoon of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] known as the [[Orange Panthacs]] in the [[Battle of Mantessa]].
